entries.text:
Verses 1-5

Psalm 43

The Cry Against the Ungodly Nation and Antichrist

1. The cry to God (Psalms 43:1-2)

2. Send out Thy light and truth (Psalms 43:3-5)

Here their enemies are mentioned, the ungodly nation, serving the beast (Revelation 13:11-18). The deceitful and unjust man, is that coming man of sin, the son of perdition, who then has taken his seat in the temple of God in Jerusalem (2 Thessalonians 2:1-17). They realize their help must come from the Lord to lead them to the holy hill and the sanctuary. They call for the coming of Him who is “the Light and the Truth.”
